violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Food contact surfaces of the can opener were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Pasta, ground beef, and burgers observed held at 113-123 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were reheated. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024

Tofu, cooked vegetables, chicken, eggplant, and rice observed held at 102-124 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All items were reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024

Couscous, tuna salad, deli meat sandwich, and corn & tomato salad observed held at 48-74 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Couscous, deli meat sandwich, and corn & tomato salad were disposed of. Tuna was placed in cooler. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024

The establishment was observed non-continuously cooking (partial cooking) chicken at time of inspection. The establishment does not have approval for this procedure at this time. Establishment is to submit a formal request for approval to continue this procedure. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024
Water observed in stacked plastic cups. After cleaning and sanitizing, equipment and utensils must be air dried. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the cold drawers in the grill area, and the table beneath the grill have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024
Hot water is not available at the hand sink in the dishwashing area. A work order has been submitted. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024
The blade guard on the slicer was not in good repair (bent). The slicer is not to be used until the blade guard has been replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024
The blade guard on the slicer was not in good repair (bent). The slicer is not to be used until the blade guard has been replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: utensil drawers chest freezer flour bins cold drawer unit beneath grill cold hold unit in grill area grill New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024

The floors especially behind equipment such as the fryers have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024
Ceiling tiles next to the 3 door reach-in/walk in cooler are missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024

Ceiling light covers in the dry storage area have an accumulation of dried liquid and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2024
Ceiling lights in the cooking area of the kitchen are in poor repair, not functioning properly. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024

The ice machine floor drain has an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024
